excerpts.excerpt:
(to the President)
We rushed this and now we're seeing
the results.
PRESIDENT LITTON
We had no choice! Every estimate
had us racing against the clock to
get this done or face a world wide
calamity! Should we have done
nothing and allow the world to
end?!
The room goes quiet. Finally...
DR. JENNINGS
I understand. But clearly
something is starting to go wrong.
The Space Station itself is having
technical failures. A worker died
up there. We need more time to
test things, work out the bugs.
DR. QUIGLEY
You want us to take it offline?

JAKE
Hey!
A WORKER near the top of the scaffolding looks down.
JAKE (CONT’D)
What are you doing?
WORKER
Huh?
And suddenly Jake leaps up, climbing the scaffolding like a
chimp, without the slightest fear. The other workers all
stop and watch.
Jake gets to the worker - who is using a high tech power
wrench on the bolts of the panel door.
PRESIDENT LITTON (CONT'D)
JAKE
Gimme that.
(then)
There's a reason these guns have
torque meters. If you tighten
these bolts too tight, you're gonna
weaken them.
WORKER
You want them to be loose?
JAKE
I want them to be right!

MAX
What are you suggesting?
Behind Max, Sarah gets a TEXT on her smart phone. Her
expression darkens as she reads. She exits the room.
HECTOR
Max, if something is going wrong,
we need to know about it. Critical
failure would be catastrophic on a
global scale. We're talking about
a Geostorm that could be far worse
than the very thing we were trying
to prevent.
INT. MAX AND SARAH'S BEDROOM - SAME
Sarah enters the bedroom and goes to a closet drawer. She
opens it to reveal a hand gun inside.
Sarah picks up the gun, loads a clip and exits.
INT. MAX AND SARAH'S WASHINGTON TOWNHOUSE - SAME
Now Max paces as well, concerned.
MAX
I'll get into this, Hector. I'll
have the block removed by morning.
Trust me, I'm equally concerned.

Seeing it this closely has an enormous impact on Jake. Just
then the International Space Station comes into view. Jake’s
jaw drops.
The Shuttle approaches this amazing city in space. It’s
overwhelming.
JAKE
(sotto)
My God. It's... incredible.
MIKE
You're surprised? Didn't you build
that thing?
JAKE
In sections. I've never seen it
all put together. Up close it's...
different.
EXT. SHUTTLE BAY - INTERNATIONAL SPACE STATION - SAME
Enormous Bay Doors open as the Shuttle approaches. As it
lands inside we see dozens of other Shuttle-type crafts;
different shapes, sizes, marked by their countries of origin.
The Bay Doors close and the airlocks kick in.
INT. SHUTTLE BAY - INTERNATIONAL SPACE STATION - SAME
Ute Fassbinder marches over and meets Jake as he climbs out
of the Shuttle.

JAKE
Think we can retrieve anything out
of the hard drives?
DUNCAN
If there's flash memory left in the
components. But, I mean, look at
it, Gov.
ALUKO
Even if we find code corruption,
how do we know it wasn't caused in
the wreck?
Duncan turns towards Kagawa.
DUNCAN
If your bleedin' robots didn't
malfunction we--
KAGAWA
It's not my robots fault!
DUNCAN
It fell all by itself, did it?
KAGAWA
Don't blame this all on me!

JAKE
We haven't found anything yet. I
needed to give you my heartfelt
apology.
Pissed, Max prepares to jack out--
MAX
Jake, I'm dealing with some very
serious things right now--
JAKE
You need to know how difficult this
is up here. Hell, it's practically
a blowtorched horses net.
That freezes Max. Is Jake really referencing their childhood
code? He walks closer to Jake and looks him in the eye. He
nods. Turns to one of the Techs in the room.
JAKE (CONT'D)
MAX
Record this for me. I'm going to
want to include this in my report.
The Tech nods and does something on his HoloFrame. Max turns
back to Jake.
MAX (CONT’D)
Continue.

DEKKOM
I forgot to logoff again. I
thought I was getting better at
that.
Dekkom logs off. Sarah is frozen stiff waiting for either
man to see the shoes. But Dekkom and the General exit.
Sarah closes her eyes, says a silent prayer and follows.
CUT TO:
INT. BASEMENT - MAX'S TOWNHOUSE - NIGHT
The wall-sized HoloFrame comes to life, but this time
PROJECTS a 3D image into and filling the entire room. We SEE
a virtual GLOBE of the Earth, spinning.
Max and Sarah appear, staring at it. In a flash we see some
storms quickly forming over several cities. Spreading faster
and faster. Soon the globe is covered in storms and
anomalies; a WORLD CONSUMED IN NATURAL DISASTER.
Just as fast, it resets and starts again! Only this time, it
starts in different cities and grows in a different pattern.
This repeats over and over, very quickly, but always ending
with the world covered in weather anomalies.
SARAH
What the hell is this, Max?

Max pulls out his HoloFrame with Alcon playing on it.
MAX
I'll explain everything, Sir.
EXT. CONVENTION CENTER - SAME
The car speeds away as the exit door blasts open, the
remaining Shooter emerges and rushes into the street and
FIRES at the retreating car. Lammy stumbles out behind him,
yelling into his comms.
LAMMY
Eagle has flown! Repeat, Eagle's
flown!!
EXT. NEWS STATION - SAME
Dekkom, Cassandra and two GUARDS exit the News Station and
head towards a waiting car.
DEKKOM
(into comms)
Lammy, you catch that bird, you
understand!
EXT. CONVENTION CENTER - SAME
A government town car pulls up, the two Gunmen from the
parking structure inside. Lammy and the Shooter get in and
give chase.
LAMMY
We're on the hunt!

More bullets RIP into the electric cab.
SARAH
I just have to take care of a
little problem first!
EXT. ORLANDO STREETS - CONTINUOUS
Sarah darts the electric cab through the Blinding Bolts of
Electricity that surrounds them. The Town Car right on her
tail.
With unbelievable skill, Sarah WHIPS the car 180 degrees,
POPS into reverse and DRIVES backwards, so she can FIRE her
weapon back at the Town Car.
Though the Town Car GAINS, Sarah SHOOTS the driver square in
the head. He goes DOWN.
The electric cab WHIPS around again and takes OFF, vanishing
around a blind corner.
Lammy YANKS the dead driver out from behind the wheel and
takes over. Peeling out, he turns the blind corner.
When he comes around he's shocked to see the electric cab has
vanished.
LAMMY
What the--?
